violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Food employee health agreement left with PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2022

The floor around the pallets of bird seed and the shelving where the dog food is located have an accumulation of bird seeds and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per person in charge, pest control company services the establishment on a monthly basis. Pest records were reviewed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
